reason: Verified that agent "QA-20260407-170014-t3v8" responds correctly to a math question with the answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked on "QA-20260407-170014-t3v8" agent in the sidebar - Agent page loaded, displaying landing page with message input field
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status was "idle" at the time of clicking
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message was typed into the input field and sent via send button
Waited for response - Response received within 5 seconds
Verified the response mentions "4" - Agent response clearly shows "4" as the answer to the math question
Took final screenshot - Screenshot shows the complete chat conversation with user message and agent response of "4"
